name: Antler
description: Antler residency application — founder profile, idea, market, and ambition.

fields.label: Founder Name
fields.promptHint: Full name of the primary applicant.

fields.label: Professional Background
fields.promptHint: Career history, key roles, achievements. Focus on what makes you credible.

fields.label: What is your startup idea?
fields.promptHint: The idea, target customer, and how it works. Okay if still forming.

fields.label: Why is now the right time?
fields.promptHint: Market timing: regulatory shift, technology inflection, behavior change.

fields.label: Target Market
fields.promptHint: Who are your customers? Market size and segmentation.

fields.label: Co-founder Preference
fields.promptHint: Looking for a co-founder? Describe ideal complementary skills.

fields.label: Biggest Professional Achievement
fields.promptHint: One standout accomplishment that demonstrates your ability to execute.

fields.label: Long-Term Vision
fields.promptHint: Where does this go in 10 years? Think big but stay grounded.
